message:
Simplify release workflow

Streamline the release workflow by leveraging tenzir-changelog features:

- Replace manual version input with bump type dropdown (major/minor/patch)
- Remove title input (uses default "Tenzir Node vX.Y.Z")
- Use `--minor`/`--patch`/`--major` flags for version computation
- Use `--commit` flag to atomically commit and tag
- Use `--no-latest` flag for backport releases

This PR depends on tenzir-changelog improvements:
- `--commit` flag for `release publish`
- `--no-latest` flag for `release publish`
- `release create` outputting the version to stdout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
